prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京体育大学是教育部直属的211工程重点建设高校，同时入选国家双一流建设高校，是国内体育类院校的标杆。虽非985，但211与双一流身份在全国范围内具有较高认可度，对 考生有较强吸引力。学校地处北京，区位优势明显，其医学类（康复物理治疗）依托体育学科背景，在运动康复领域具有独特竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 康复物理治疗属于医学技术类专业，近年来随着健康意识提升和运动康复需求增长，报考热度持续走高。该专业在广西仅投放3个名额，且要求首选物理、再选化学，同时限制色 盲色弱考生，招生门槛较高、名额稀缺，导致竞争集中。北京作为一线城市，对广西考生有较强的地域吸引力，进一步推高了录取位次。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续上升趋势、招生计划持平、专业热度不减等因素，预计2026年北京体育大学医学类（康复物理治疗）最低录取位次约为23,132名，较2025年小幅上升约200名。 波动区间预计在22,785名至23,479名之间，建议考生在此区间内合理规划志愿。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: Beijing Sport University only offers one medical major in Guangxi, Rehabilitation Physical Therapy, with a very small enrollment scale. In 2021, the lowest rank was 15,328 (planned 2 students), in 2022 it was 16,544 (planned 2 students), in 2023 it dropped sharply to 48,747 (planned 2 students) due to fluctuations in the science batch that year, in 2024 it rebounded to 19,898 (planned expansion to 3 students), and in 2025 it further rose to 22,932 (planned 3 students). The 2026 enrollment plan remains at 3 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction impact. Excluding the abnormal value in 2023, the rankings over the past four years have shown a continuous upward trend, gradually climbing from 15,328 to 22,932, reflecting the intensifying competition for this major in Guangxi.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Sport University is a key university under the Ministry of Education, a 211 Project key construction university, and also selected as a national Double First-Class construction university. It is a benchmark among domestic sports universities. Although not a 985 university, its 211 and Double First-Class identities have high recognition nationwide, strongly attracting candidates. The university is located in Beijing, with obvious geographical advantages. Its medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) relies on the sports discipline background and has unique competitiveness in the field of sports rehabilitation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Rehabilitation Physical Therapy belongs to the medical technology category. In recent years, with the improvement of health awareness and the growth of sports rehabilitation demand, the popularity of applying for this major has been rising. This major only offers 3 spots in Guangxi, requires first choice of Physics and second choice of Chemistry, and also restricts color-blind and color-weak candidates. The admission threshold is high and the spots are scarce, leading to concentrated competition. As a first-tier city, Beijing has a strong regional appeal to Guangxi candidates, further pushing up the admission rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan, and sustained popularity of the major, it is predicted that the lowest admission rank for Beijing Sport University's medical category (Rehabilitation Physical Therapy) in 2026 will be approximately 23,132, a slight increase of about 200 ranks compared to 2025. The fluctuation range is expected to be between 22,785 and 23,479. Candidates are advised to plan their volunteer applications reasonably within this range.
